stats.title: School at a Glance
stats.subtitle: Key statistics and figures of Vidya Vihar Inter College

about.title: About Our Institution
about.subtitle: Discover the heritage, local context, and facilities of Vidya Vihar Inter College
about.historyContent: Established to serve the educational needs of Salarpur and surrounding regions in Varanasi, Vidya Vihar Inter College has been providing quality intermediate education under the UP Board. The school fosters academic diligence and moral character.
about.contextP1: Salarpur is a Census Town located in the Varanasi District of Uttar Pradesh, situated approximately 8–10 km from the heart of Varanasi city center. The locality boasts a literacy rate of 73.97%, which is notably higher than the Uttar Pradesh state average of 67.68%.
about.contextP2: Our campus is highly accessible and well-connected via the Varanasi–Sarnath Road. The nearest major railway hub is Varanasi Junction (Cantt), located approximately 10 km away, with Sarnath Railway Station also in close proximity. The college serves students from nearby areas including Godowlia, Sarnath, Shivpur, and Shankerpur.
about.contextP3: Being situated in the Varanasi district, which is one of India's preeminent historical education hubs (home to institutions like Banaras Hindu University, IIT-BHU, and Sampurnanand Sanskrit University), the college draws inspiration from this rich academic heritage to offer high-quality learning locally.
about.campusDescription: Our multi-building campus features 2–3 story buildings painted in light yellow/cream exteriors, set within a secure walled compound with a metal main gate featuring Hindi signage. The campus is designed to support the academic and physical growth of our students.

campusFeatures.courtyard: Large open courtyard used for morning assembly and physical activities.
campusFeatures.greening: Beautiful landscaping with trees, including palm trees, planted around the campus.
campusFeatures.parking: Dedicated bicycle parking area, accommodating the primary mode of commute for our students.
campusFeatures.solar: Eco-friendly solar street lighting installed across the campus grounds.

principal.title: Principal's Message
principal.placeholderText: Dear Students, Parents, and Well-wishers, welcome to Vidya Vihar Inter College. Our mission is to provide an inclusive and inspiring environment where every student can achieve their full potential. We emphasize academic rigor, character development, and active community participation. We invite you to join us in our journey toward educational excellence.

academics.title: Academic Programs
academics.subtitle: Comprehensive intermediate education following the UP Board curriculum
academics.classesSubtitle: We offer structured education across three developmental levels
academics.middleDesc: Core foundational classes preparing students with essential concepts in Languages, Mathematics, Science, and Social Studies.
academics.highDesc: Focus on secondary board preparation under the Uttar Pradesh Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad (UP Board).
academics.intermediateDesc: Specialized education split into academic streams to prepare students for higher education and career paths.
academics.streamsSubtitle: Intermediate students can opt for one of the three standard streams
academics.scienceDesc: Focus on analytical and scientific reasoning. Subject paths include Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) or Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (PCB).
academics.commerceDesc: Preparation for financial, business, and economic sectors. Covers core subjects like Accountancy, Business Studies, and Economics.
academics.artsDesc: Broad education in languages, social sciences, and history, fostering critical thinking and creative expression.
academics.curriculumNote: Subjects and syllabus are governed by the Uttar Pradesh Board (UPMSP). Course textbooks, exams, and certifications strictly adhere to board regulations.

admissions.title: Admissions & Entry
admissions.subtitle: Detailed information about admission timelines, eligibility, and enquiry
admissions.cycleDesc: Admissions typically open in the months of March and April. The school conducts admissions based on seat availability and basic entry evaluations.
admissions.entryPointsList: Entry points are standard at Class 6 (Middle School), Class 9 (High School), and Class 11 (Intermediate).
admissions.docsDesc: Parents/Students must submit clear copies of the following documents during admission registration:
docsList: Transfer Certificate (TC) from the previous school
Caste Certificate (if applying under reserved categories)
admissions.feesDesc: Please contact the school administrative office for the detailed class-wise fee structure.
admissions.formDesc: Submit an enquiry to request detailed information about seat availability, fees, and admission tests.
admissions.successDesc: Thank you for your interest in Vidya Vihar Inter College. A representative will contact you on your WhatsApp number shortly.

validation.phonePattern: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with the school administration or visit our campus
contact.addressDesc: 82XJ+6W6, Near Vidya Vihar Inter College, Salarpur, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh 221112
contact.directionsDesc: The campus is situated near the Varanasi-Sarnath Road, making it highly accessible via auto-rickshaws, buses, and local transport. It is approximately 10 km from Varanasi Junction (Cantt) and near Sarnath Railway Station. Major local landmarks include Godowlia (~10km), Shivpur, and Shankerpur.

facilities.title: Campus Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Infrastructure and resources supporting student activities and learning
facilities.courtyardDesc: A spacious, open courtyard located at the center of the campus. It serves as the venue for the daily morning assemblies, national day celebrations, and physical exercise sessions.
facilities.parkingDesc: Understanding that most of our students commute from nearby villages and town areas by bicycle, we provide a secure, covered compound area dedicated entirely to bicycle parking.
facilities.classroomDesc: The school features 2-3 story academic blocks with cream/light yellow exteriors. Classrooms are designed to be ventilated and spacious, facilitating focused group study.
facilities.solarDesc: In line with eco-friendly initiatives, the campus grounds are equipped with solar-powered street lighting, ensuring illumination and safety across the compound during evening hours.

news.title: News & Notices
news.subtitle: Latest updates, notifications, and holiday declarations from the college admin

sampleNotices.title: Admission Process Open for Academic Session
sampleNotices.content: Admissions are now open for Classes 6, 9, and 11. Parents can collect the enquiry form from the administrative office or submit the online enquiry form on this website. Seats are limited.

sampleNotices.title: Upcoming Summer Vacation Notice
sampleNotices.content: The school will remain closed for summer vacation starting from May 20, 2026, to June 30, 2026. Regular classes for all standards will resume on July 01, 2026.

sampleNotices.title: Mock Board Examinations Schedule
sampleNotices.content: Mock board exams for Class 10 and Class 12 students are scheduled to start from January 15, 2026. Detailed time tables have been distributed in classrooms. Attendance is mandatory.
